info.title: Timesheet API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for the Timesheet application

adminAuth.name: admin_token
adminAuth.description: Admin/User authentication via HTTP-only cookie containing JWT token

employeeAuth.name: employee_token
employeeAuth.description: Employee authentication via HTTP-only cookie containing JWT token

deviceAuth.name: device_token
deviceAuth.description: Device authentication via HTTP-only cookie containing JWT token
